mapper.select: select (select count(*) from farming_cycle) as cycleCount, (select count(*) from product_info) as productCount, (select count(*) from order_info) as orderCount, (select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from order_info where order_status in ('PENDING_RECEIVE','FINISHED')) as totalAmount

select (select count(*) from farming_cycle where user_id = #{sellerId} and business_type = #{businessType}) as cycleCount, (select count(*) from product_info where seller_id = #{sellerId} and seller_type = #{businessType}) as productCount, (select count(*) from order_info where seller_id = #{sellerId}) as orderCount, (select ifnull(sum(total_amount), 0) from order_info where seller_id = #{sellerId} and order_status in ('PENDING_RECEIVE','FINISHED')) as totalAmount
